title: Generac Grid Services Supporting the AlectraDrive @Home Electric Vehicle Initiative
text: Concerto™ platform now enabling Alectra Utilities to offer smart EV charging for single-family and multifamily customers WAUKESHA, Wis. , June 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Generac Grid Services, a subsidiary of Generac Power Systems (NYSE: GNRC), a leading designer and manufacturer of energy technology solutions and other power products, today announced that its Concerto™ platform is now supporting AlectraDrive @Home, a managed electric vehicle charging initiative operated by Alectra Utilities.

title: Generac Powers Up 8.79% on Growth Potential, Strong Texas Sales
text: Generac Holdings Inc. NYSE: GNRC was the second-biggest price mover in the S&P 500 on June 27. The stock gapped up at the open and advanced $11.52, or 8.79%, to finish at $142.53.

title: Why Generac Holdings Stock Triumphed on Tuesday
text: Investors were cheered by an interview the power generation specialist's CEO granted to Bloomberg. He said demand for backup generators is particularly high in Texas.

title: Southern Heat Wave Boosts Generator Demand and Generac Shares Rise
text: Generac shares jumped 8.8% on Tuesday as a searing heat wave in the Southern U.S. drove up generator demand.

title: Markets Rise on Positive News about Consumer Confidence and Travel Demand
text: Markets rise on Tuesday, June 27, 2023 on positive news about consumer confidence and rising travel demand.

title: Generac stock surges to lead the S&P 500 gainers, after report that Texas heat wave has boosted sales
text: Shares of Generac Holdings Inc. GNRC, +8.92% powered up 9.3% toward an eight-month high in afternoon trading Tuesday, which was enough to pace the S&P 500's SPX, +1.11% gainers. The home power generator maker's stock was getting a boost after Chief Executive Officer Aaron Jagdfeld told Bloomberg that the company has seen a dramatic increase in sales in the Texas region, as a heat wave has raised concerns over the stability of the state's power grid.

title: Markets Rise Midday Amid Optimism About Consumer Spending and Travel Demand
text: U.S. equities were in positive territory at midday on June 27, 2023, as consumer confidence rose amid optimism about spending and travel demand.

title: Markets Drop for 3rd Straight Day as Powell Sees More Interest Rate Hikes Ahead
text: Markets drop for 3rd straight day on Wednesday, June 21, 2023, as Fed's Powell sees more interest rate hikes ahead.

title: Strength Seen in Generac Holdings (GNRC): Can Its 7.9% Jump Turn into More Strength?
text: Generac Holdings (GNRC) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

title: Generac stock charges higher to pace the S&P 500 gainers after reports of widespread power outages
text: Shares of Generac Holdings Inc. GNRC, +7.46% powered up 7.6% in afternoon trading, enough to pace the S&P 500's SPX, -0.43% gainers. Investors appear to be flocking to the maker of home generators amid reports of widespread power outages in the southern U.S. resulting and oppressive heat following heavy storms.

title: Spartronics Begins Legal Campaign to Hold Generac Responsible for Millions in Unpaid Supplier Bills
text: WILLIAMSPORT, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Spartronics, a leading contract manufacturer of complex electronic and electromechanical devices for defense, medical and life sciences sectors, announced the beginning of a legal campaign against generator manufacturer Generac for failing to pay suppliers. Two lawsuits filed Friday are in response to Generac refusing to pay suppliers millions of dollars for parts that Generac authorized. Additional lawsuits are anticipated to follow. title: 3 Bargain Stocks to Buy in June Before They Bounce
text: Now that Memorial Day is in the rearview mirror, investors are thinking about summer. This is historically a quieter time for markets.
